2.name: Transferases
2.description: Catalyze the transfer of a group from one molecule to another

4.name: Lyases
4.description: Catalyze addition or removal of groups to form double bonds

6.name: Ligases
6.description: Catalyze the formation of bonds with ATP cleavage

7.name: Translocases
7.description: Catalyze the movement of ions or molecules across membranes
